user.title: Hunonic login
user.description:
Enter your Hunonic account phone number and password.

⚠️ **Recommended: create a NEW separate Hunonic account for Home Assistant**, then share your home/devices to it from your main account. If you log in with your main account (the one used on your phone), **your phone may get logged out** because Hunonic limits the number of login sessions. (Shared homes are auto-accepted on login.)

homes.title: Select homes
homes.description: Tick the homes to load into Home Assistant (all by default). Each home becomes its own hub. Change later via Configure — no re-login needed.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Hunonic server. Check your internet connection.

abort.already_configured: This account is already configured in Home Assistant.

init.title: Select homes
init.description: Tick the homes to load into Home Assistant. Untick to remove a home from HA. The integration reloads after saving.
